title: tabernaemontana coronaria
intro: Tabernaemontana coronaria, also known as the Coral Gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana coronaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal preparations, which are typically used to treat a range of health conditions, from colds and flu to more serious illnesses.
